item_specifications.breed_recommendation: Border Collie, Corgi, American Staffordshire Terrier, Large, Weight Range: 50-65 LBS
item_specifications.special_feature: 1 Orthopedic, 2 Soft Sherpa Fleece, 3 OEKO STANDARD-100, 4 Removable Washable Cover, 5 Non Skid Bottom

about_item: Cloud-Soft Comfort: This comfy dog bed is made from 200gsm medium-weight sherpa fleece. Dense, skin-friendly fabric makes it suitable puppy bed, dog mat, or dog crate bed. Designed to promote restful sleep

Unzip, Wash, Done: This easy-clean dog bed comes with an easy-to-remove, machine washable cover. Simply unzip, toss the cover into your normal wash cycle, and air-dry. The fabric resists fading and shrinking, wash after wash—so it stays looking and fitting like new, no matter how often it's cleaned. Tip: For best results, use a lint roller to remove pet hair before washing—especially on larger beds—to help the cover maintain its perfect condition

Orthopedic Egg-Crate Support: This pet bed features high-density egg-crate foam. Raised points and dips that contour to your pet's body. This design eases pressure on joints and muscles, balancing soft comfort with firm support—ideal for everyday use and especially beneficial for senior pets, large breeds, or those with arthritis

Pet-Safe & Anti-Slip: Crafted with CertiPUR-US certified foam and OEKO-TEX Standard 100 (24.HCN.46956) approved fabrics, this dog bed is free from over 1,000 harmful chemicals. A rubberized anti-slip bottom keeps the pet bed for large sized dogs or small size securely in place on any floor surface

Perfect Fit for Every Pet & Place: Available in multiple sizes, each tailored to specific weight ranges. This versatile dog bed works in your home, on road trips, or outdoors. Every breed. Every lifestyle. Whether you need a dog beds large sized dog option, a compact dog crate bed, or a travel-friendly dog mat, there's a size made to match

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, soft with a fleece top, and easy to wash and clean. They appreciate its comfort and value for money, and their pets enjoy using it. The size receives mixed feedback - while some find it perfect for their Golden Retrievers, others say it's not large enough. Durability is also mixed, with some finding it durable while others report it tearing after a week of use.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality.

examples.snippet: Great bed for our standard Golden doodle, will work now & when she’s full grown. It is well made, easy to clean & best thing, she tear it to pieces....
This is a great dog bed at an excellent price. Bought it for my older dog who has some arthritis but prefers to sleep on the floor instead of my bed....
It seemed good quality, so I got 2 of them. However, they are no longer waterproof after a couple of washes. The sponge inserts are practically ruined
Love these beds. 160 furbaby loves these beds. Great quality and easy on and off cover to be able to clean. Machine wash and dry with no issues.

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate that the pet bed is easy to wash, as the cover is removable and can be thrown in the wash or vacuumed.

examples.snippet: Easy to clean, machine washable cover is easy to take off, the egg shell foam is not very sturdy as it tore a little while scrubbing but still looks...
My fur baby and I love this bed! It is soft, warm, and thick. It's easy to wash and is waterproof. This product is worth it and is a good value.
Love that the cover is waterproof, removable, washable, and we'll made. Helps keep the bed from smelling like dog. Only wish it was a little heavier....
...Found a liner in minutes that was less than $15. Removable, washable cover has thin lining on inside but not enough for my dog that occasionally...

insights.title: Softness
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed soft and well-padded, with a cushiony feel that's less stiff in the mornings.

examples.snippet: Soft and comfortable bed for a golden retriever. However, it is only good as a temporary bed as you continue your search for a better quality product.
It is very soft and all three of my dachshunds lay on it together. We also have a pit/lab mix and she sleeps on it every night. It is a very nice bed.
...Very disappointed! Don't get me wrong, the bed was super soft and comfortable and if you have a dog that will never chew it's a great bed....
It is easy to clean and it is firm. My dogs tend to lay on it when we’re in the kitchen. I love that they don’t dig in it and make a mess.

Bed is great and comfy but it is not waterproof as stated so when something spilled on it I was easily able to take off the top and wash it but the...
The bed was very comfortable, and very edible. The sherpa-style top encouraged chewing. I wish that the top was the same material as the underside.
...I am very happy with this product. It was reasonably priced, it’s very comfy, great quality and the brown looks great with my bedroom fruniture.

This bed is soft and is a great price, but definitely do not buy this for dogs that decide its a chew toy. This bed is not tough by anymeans.
It is good value. It’s not that soft nor very thick nor very supportive, but it also doesn’t cost very much, and is lightweight/easy to transport.
...off..there seemed to be something that made him want to chew it..waste of money..never ever happened with any other bed I have bought!

My dog loves this bed. I got it for him for Christmas. I haven’t had to wash it yet, but I like the fact that I can take the removable top off....
Reasonably priced and my dog loves it. I grow tired of reading reviews where their dog chewed it up. That's a problem with the dog, NOT the bedding.
My dogs love this bed, medium to large size dogs can both fit on it and sometimes fight a little for who gets control of it for the night....

insights.title: Durability
insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the pet bed's durability, with some finding it durable while others report that it tore up after a week of use and the cover is falling apart.

examples.snippet: Not durable. Was totally destroyed in a day. Foam insert oversized and difficult to get zipped into cover. Caused bed to not lay flat.
...The cover is easy to put on and seems like it will be durable. Unfortunately, I may never find out how durable it is since my boy doesn't like it....

...It looks great and has been very durable! We ended up getting a second one because both of my dogs love it! The material is super soft and comfy!

examples.snippet: ...Perfect size. Perfect value. Padding looks good, & will hold up well. This is the replacement for another bed that has held 3 dogs, Tulip included....
Nice Bed XL was great size for our 60 lb dog.. She loves it... but maybe too much , she does dig on it little made a hole in first hour we had it .....
Too small!! The 36" size is actually only 34" long (totally expanded)... what a rip off. 2" short. Plus it was cut crooked, just very shoddy done....
This bed is a good size and as advertised EXCEPT they forgot to add to the listing that the top is basically velcro and will attract every single...

authors_reviews.title: High quality and more versatile than I thought it would be
authors_reviews.text: I really love this dog bed. I actually use it in the trunk space of my SUV (Subaru forester) so that my pup has a comfy place to sit when traveling. It also makes an excellent diaper changing station when I’m out and about with my little one. It’s a good amount of padding and wide enough that it fills the entire trunk space. When I need to put luggage back there instead, the dog bed folds easily in half and I believe it has little snaps to keep it folded in place.In summary, the dog bed is soft, looks nice, is lightweight, and worth every penny. If this one ever bites the dust I’ll promptly buy another.

authors_reviews.title: I even bought two!! Love!!
authors_reviews.text: So I ordered the bigger size (44x32x3) about a year ago.. My dog's love it! I bought it for my English lab who weighs about 100 lbs. He is huge!!! The bed is perfect size for him! I later bought the 30x20x3 for my medium sized dog. He weighs about 25 lbs. That size is so perfect for him. I love how the covers can be removed and washed. I have done that a couple times without issues. The black is such a good look...it does show stuff but that just happens with time...give it a wash and good to go. Easy to put cover back on. Great fabric quality. The inside is an egg crate type cushion. It doesn't flatten. My large dog chews literally everything up...but he left the beds alone oddly...I think he knows they're keepers lol. Highly recommend. Great value for the money. I recommend these to anyone who wants a great dog bed. I love them so much, I even purchased again. I really do love these beds!!! My cats uses them too but only when available lol! They all fight over them now. Great beds!!!
authors_reviews.author: ShoppinMama

authors_reviews.title: Dog loves it!
authors_reviews.text: Great dog bed. My dog loves it so much she'll use it as a pillow on hot days when she wants her stomach on the cool ground. Shes had a few overnight accidents in the bed and it washed out fine. Ive washed it 5 or 6 times and always air dry. Seems to be holding up fine.
authors_reviews.author: Cl

authors_reviews.title: Great but not that I needed
authors_reviews.text: The bed was great but it's just not exactly what I need. It didn't fit the kennel which is my fault for not properly measuring. But it's also not waterproof. And it has a soft cover and once I put it together I realized my dog is very messy coming in and out and I need one that's waterproof and also fits his kennel. So this would work for a little baby that stays in the house but my huge mix Malamute shepherd needs a waterproof bed with a leather feel. Because he also gets hot easy so he had probably rather not have a warm bed.
authors_reviews.author: Ava

authors_reviews.title: O so supportive and comfy. I tried it myself!
authors_reviews.text: This is the 2nd bed - I now have 2 beds one for each dog 2 different size crates. xl and xxl. Superb quality and easy to put on cover. Thick comfy and supportive. Ove dog just recovered from ACL surgery and the other a 8 month old (huge already) puppy who thinks his sisters bed and crate is better. He immediately went in and laid down on his new bed and loves it! I’m anticipating crate switcharoo visiting back and forth now.
authors_reviews.author: Kathleen T

authors_reviews.title: Dogs love this bed!
authors_reviews.text: Great bed! Dogs loved it right away. This is our second one and we love them.
authors_reviews.author: Annette Keenberg

authors_reviews.title: Picky dog approved.
authors_reviews.text: Picky dog approved! I bought this for my German Shepherd (XL- he’s 85lbs) and he loves it. Just thick enough to pad him from the floor but not too squishy he won’t use it. I’ve even put it on top of his cot! He’s very picky and usually prefers to sleep all stretched out on the floor. My Doberman kept trying to steal it so I had to buy another one! Super easy to wash cover, all one piece, zips up easily.
authors_reviews.author: AC

authors_reviews.title: Unfortunately not an option for dogs or pups that chew
authors_reviews.text: Didn’t even last 2 months. We had this delivered at the end of February and it’s now April 6. I was hoping it would because it fits perfectly inside his crate, and it looked like it would be super comfortable. I figured chances were good he’d chew the cover, but no worries because the cover is replaceable. Well in a matter of maybe 10 minutes tonight, he shredded the cover and was tossing bits of the foam bed itself outside of the crate.The bed looks nice. It appears sturdy (but isn’t sturdy enough). It keeps things quiet inside the crate. Putting the cover on over the foam to fully assemble the bed is easy. For all of this, I gave the bed 3 stars. I mean, it IS a very nice bed - if you have a dog that won’t chew it up.I would NOT recommend this for anyone with a dog that likes to chew. It’s way too expensive to have to keep purchasing every 2 months. I’m so disappointed. I had high hopes for this bed, and even bought another one from the same company, along with a comforter and sheets for our own bed.I haven’t reached out to customer support yet, but I will update my post if needed.
authors_reviews.author: Marissa Irwin

other_countries_reviews.title: Good bed.
other_countries_reviews.text: My female indie goes to sleep on this, and sleeps like she is knocked out.
other_countries_reviews.author: Aniruddha Yadav

other_countries_reviews.title: Comfortable, Supportive, and Easy-to-Clean Dog Bed
other_countries_reviews.text: The Bedsure dog bed is perfect for our large dog. The orthopedic foam provides excellent support, especially for older dogs or those with joint issues, and our dog immediately took to it.The removable cover is easy to unzip and machine washable, which makes cleaning simple. The bed itself is generously sized, giving plenty of room to stretch out, and the materials feel soft, durable, and high quality.Overall, this bed combines comfort, support, and practicality. Our dog sleeps on it every day, and it has held up well over time. Highly recommend for anyone with a large dog looking for a cozy, orthopedic option.
other_countries_reviews.author: Ryan

other_countries_reviews.title: They are great beds for animals
other_countries_reviews.text: I know have 4 of these beds. They're great, sturdy and the removeable cover is easy to wash. Recommend.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Doggo approved
other_countries_reviews.text: This is Ru, she often favours the cold hard floor; however, somewhere comfy and soft to sprawl out is needed for quality afternoon naps (and creeping on the humans during odd feeding routines, good pace to drool too). She just received it today, she’s not one to chew on things much or rip holes in things, so I expect this bed will be used for chewing on treats and afternoon naps.Removable cover that’s water proof so if Ru pukes all over it I can wash it easy peasy.. . So far tho, the cold hard floor is still the preferred. But come bedtime snack time, she’ll be lounging, licking, and then snoozing until it’s real bedtime.
other_countries_reviews.author: Jared Gottselig

other_countries_reviews.title: Not as described
other_countries_reviews.text: The bed itself is a nice size. I purchased the jumbo size for my Saint Bernard but it is NOT waterproof like it says in the description and shows in the photos. My Saint is old and sometimes is sick in the night ....it went right through to the foam. Will unfortunately be returning which because of the size will be difficult. Just wanted to add I've kept the bed. The company has been excellent to work with! They contacted me after my review apologized for the inconvenience and have paid for the water proof blank I had to order to put on the bed. I'm very happy since my dog loves this bed and the initial credit I had from amazon to buy the blanket has been given back. Thank you to Amazon and Bedsure for correcting this problem. Amazing customer service!
other_countries_reviews.author: Penny B.
